site.title: Kaus Dutta
site.description: Full Stack AI Application Developer and Design Lead at Nokia in Ottawa, Canada. Master's in Data Science from the University of Ottawa.
site.keywords: Kaustubh Dutta, Full Stack Developer, React, TypeScript, Nokia, Ottawa, Data Science

hero.headline:
FULL STACK
DEVELOPER
hero.tagline: Truly fascinated by the way technology is evolving and that the human race is gradually moving towards achieving an infinite paradise of knowledge. Be it the thirst to reach the unreachable territories of the universe or developing a quintessential technology to understand the solar flares or achieving a quantum computer on the planet itself is what I feel is the distinguishing character of the human race that is indeed motivational and what sets us apart in this world.
hero.roleLine: Full Stack AI Application Developer · Design Lead
hero.techStrip: React · TypeScript · Webpack · Cypress · JEST · Open Street Map · AG Grid · Module Federation

about.heading:
ABOUT
ME
about.intro: As a Software Engineer, I am fascinated by how technology evolves and how humanity moves toward an ever-expanding horizon of knowledge from exploring the universe to pursuing breakthroughs like quantum computing.
about.interests: Product Design · Women Welfare · Geopolitics · Education · Technology · Micro & Macro Economics · Environment
about.motto: Think about an idea that the world has not thought about, yet.
about.activitiesIntro: Apart from coding, some other activities that I love to do!

support.heading:
BUY ME
A COFFEE
support.lead: If this portfolio or my work has been useful, you can leave a small thank-you — it helps keep side projects and open-source experiments going.

githubActivity.heading:
GITHUB
ACTIVITY
githubActivity.subtitle: Contribution rhythm over the last year.

roles.title: Full Stack AI Application Developer II & Project Design Lead
bullets: Team Lead for User Manager, Group Manager and License Manager Web Application Module of Nokia's NSP Product.
Key role in defining epics and stories based on the new features conceptualized by PLM and UX.
Leading front-end design architecture as well as define the team capacity for each sprint.
roles.stack: Release Measurement · React 18 · Module Federation · TypeScript · Webpack 5 · Cypress · Regex · OpenStreetMap · AG Grid · Highcharts · D3 · Formik · Lodash · Popper · CodeMirror

roles.title: Full Stack AI Application Developer II
bullets: Development of Nokia's NSP Front End using Module Federation — a key feature of webpack 5 that allows deployable modules (micro-frontend) to be loaded on demand when they are needed.
Team Lead in the development of User Manager Module.
roles.stack: React 18 · Module Federation · TypeScript · Webpack 5 · JUnit · Regex · OpenStreetMap · AG Grid · Highcharts · D3

roles.title: Application Developer
bullets: Team Lead for Development of re-usable react core components in respective libraries for Nokia's NSP Product.
Library Versioning – Semantic.
roles.stack: React 16 · JavaScript · CSS Flex · AG Grid · Highcharts · Regex

roles.title: Software Developer & Data Scientist — Intern
bullets: Development of Automated Power BI reports to track and gain insights across Software Development Teams.
Analyzed Service Level Agreements using DAX and Power Queries to track Incoming JIRA Defect and Target Resolution Days for Nokia Software (NSW) Business Group.
roles.stack: Perl · Cron · MariaDB · DAX · Power BI Service

roles.title: Software Developer & Data Scientist — CO-OP
bullets: KPI Calculations and help PMO office to drive insights.
VBA Macros, Pivot Tables, Advanced Excel, Power Query.
roles.stack: VBA · Pivot tables · Excel · Power Query

roles.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Enterprise SPA delivery with Angular and TypeScript.
Collaboration with UX on Willis Insurance and related client builds.

roles.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Developed UX Wireframes.
UI Design for Willis Insurance – single page application in AngularJS.
UX wireframes in Marvel with Angular and JavaScript.

roles.title: Software Engineer Intern — Network Automation (LTE)
bullets: LTE Network Architecture.
Small Cell Planning.
OFDM Downlink & SC-FDMA Uplink.
LTE Channel Capacity.
Quality of Service (QoS).
Architecture of small / hard handoff.
roles.stack: LTE · OFDM · SC-FDMA · QoS · handoff design

roles.title: Software Engineer Intern — Network Automation
bullets: Softstarters, Plotting & Analysis of Torque-Speed and Speed-Current curves using ABB Prosoft of 110-, 160- & 220-kW motors.
SIEMENS SIMARIS Curves & Tripping Characteristics using SIMOCODE — Dynamic & Powerful Smart Motor Management System.
Diesel Generator Sizing for the calculation of supplying emergency power to essential loads.
Calculation of phase correction in AC circuits to reduce voltage and current phase difference by using Capacitor Banks.
roles.stack: SIMARIS · SIMOCODE · motor analysis · DG sizing · capacitor banks

items.degree: Master's, Data Science (Computer Science & Business Technology)
items.detail: Grade A · Coursework spans software development (React, Angular, Java, SQL), data analytics, machine learning, BI, and operational excellence.

items.school: KIIT — Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology
items.detail: Projects: Computed Tomography image reconstruction, Dawn-to-Dusk lamp, Wireless Spybot. Societies: Robotic Society, Social Responsibility Cell.

items.title: Hyperledger vehicle ownership & depreciation
items.description: Smart contract network to track vehicle ownership and attach a depreciation index to VIN for automotive security and privacy. Designed as a potential uOttawa course deliverable.

items.title: Image reconstruction & computed tomography
items.description: Radon transforms in MATLAB with multi-angle projections and wavelet denoising for improved reconstruction quality.

items.title: Wireless Spybot
items.description: ATmega16-based wireless rover with live video feedback for surveillance-style maneuvering.

items.title: Dawn to Dusk automatic lamp
items.description: Ambient light sensing to save power by switching illumination only when needed.

items.title: Impacts of Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence on Mankind
Blockchain: The Perfect Data Protection Tool
Li-Fi: A Potential Game Changer in Data Transfer
items.meta: International Journal of Electrical, Electronics and Data Communication (IJEEDC) · Dec 1, 2016

items.title: Analysis of Channel Capacity using MIMO-OFDM for 4G Applications

chatbot.snippetExperience: Experience spans Nokia (full stack & Design Lead), Capgemini, Jio, and Siemens — details are in Experience.
